steps.t: The Warg is being held captive in the northern part of Kauppa-kohta. Valtteri, the Lossoth Hunt-leader, has instructed you to defeat the Warg his part…
Valtteri is in the northern part of Kauppa-kohta, the Lossoth trading post. You should speak with Valtteri again, now that you have defeated the Warg.
